items.name: chaos-harness
items.description: Chaos Harness 采用“强制对齐”的逆向工程思路，用铁律取代建议。铁律不是可供解释的文本，而是原子级的执行原语。通过消除语义灰色空间，在架构层面物理阻断 Agent 的规避路径，确保在释放其创造力的同时，将行为严格锁定在质量与安全的边界之内。

items.name: custom_agent
items.description: Custom Agents is a terminal-based AI coding assistant that runs entirely on your machine. It gives you specialized AI agents — explorer, coder, and reviewer — that can read, write, search, and reason about your codebase. Think of it as your own local Claude Code, powered by any OpenAI-compatible API (OpenRouter, OpenAI, Ollama, LM Studio).
